rows.label: qev060602_MSG0009
rows.name:
Did you speak with Orleron? Was he
not quite a splendid Zaruboggan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060602_SEL0031
rows.name: Praise him for being splendid.

rows.label: qev060602_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060602_SEL0041
rows.name: Criticize him for being unreliable.

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thank you very much! He will
surely be pleased to be
recognized by someone like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0011
rows.name:
As for myself, I am very proud to
have expelled such an individual at
the culmination of revoltanting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0012
rows.name:
If he has someone as strict as you
nearby, he will surely become an
even more wonderful Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0013
rows.name:
At any rate, I am very proud to
have expelled such an individual
at the culmination of revoltanting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Eh? And Orleron asked you
to fetch a Gorkwa for him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hmm, that is indeed a
difficult problem...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0016
rows.name:
On our home planet Bedun, the Gorkwas left behind
by Golbogga were everywhere, so immediately after
birth, we would set out on a journey seeking them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0017
rows.name:
However, it goes without saying
that there are no relics of
Golbogga on this Planet Mira...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0018
rows.name:
Everyone is barely managing to get by while
repairing their own Gorkwas. There is not
a single spare Gorkwa to be found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0019
rows.name:
At this rate, he might die without
being able to revoltant satisfactorily...
Hmm... whatever shall we do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_JNK0050
rows.name: Anger

rows.label: qev060602_SEL0051
rows.name: Show indignation towards Arsenican's lack of seriousness.

rows.label: qev060602_JNK0060
rows.name: Mourn

rows.label: qev060602_SEL0061
rows.name: Lament that a newly born life is about to be lost.

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0020
rows.name:
What a refreshing emotion... It feels as
though your fundamental perception of
life is entirely different from ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0021
rows.name:
However, I thank you for
thinking so deeply and
compassionately about our brethren.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0022
rows.name:
Yes... It is truly a shame, especially since we
finally gained another companion to follow
Golbogga's will and revoltant this impure world...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Eh? Is your sorrow different
from that sort of thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0024
rows.name:
Earthlings truly are mysterious beings. It
feels as though your fundamental perception
of life is entirely different from ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0025
rows.name: Hmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0026
rows.name:
...That's right... Perhaps... If that
Gorkwa remains intact, it might be possible
for Orleron to use it as his own...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0027
rows.name:
You see... While we were wandering
this land, there was a Zaruboggan who
fell from a cliff and passed away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0028
rows.name:
If his Gorkwa remains unbroken... It
might become usable as Orleron's Gorkwa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0029
rows.name:
If it exists, that Gorkwa
should be at the Abyssal Cave
Lake in Shiraki no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0030
rows.name:
...I ask this of you as well. Please,
lend a hand so that Orleron may become
a fully-fledged Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0053
rows.name:
The Gorkwa of the deceased Zaruboggan
should be at the Abyssal Cave Lake
in Shiraki no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0054
rows.name:
Please give it to Orleron and
help him become an adult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0055
rows.name:
Recently, it seems Orleron has been
troubled over an Earthling named Vera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0056
rows.name:
I simply cannot comprehend the feeling of obsessing
over such an individual at all, but... If you
wouldn't mind, please try talking to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0057
rows.name:
Orleron has become almost
entirely like an Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060602_MSG0058
rows.name:
As a brethren, I wish to understand him,
but... No matter how many times I listen, I
cannot understand a single thing he says.[ST:wait ]
